sagemaker.domain.rsessionappsettings.Cfn: A collection of settings that apply to an `RSessionGateway` app.

sagemaker.domain.rsessionappsettings.Cus.Description: A list of custom SageMaker images that are configured to run as a RSession app.

sagemaker.domain.rsessionappsettings.Def.Description: Specifies the ARNs of a SageMaker image and SageMaker image version, and the instance type that the version runs on.
